---
title: "Untitled"
---

This extension allows you to use font-awesome icons in your Quarto HTML and PDF documents.
It provides an `{{{< fa >}}}` shortcode:

- Mandatory `<icon-name>`:

  ``` markdown
  {{{< fa <icon-name> >}}}
  
  
  ```
  
  
  
  {{< fa solid star >}}
  
  
  {{< fa  star-half-stroke  >}}    
  
  
  {{<fa brands r-project size=5x >}}
  {{<fa jedi size=5x >}}
